idea_provenance: novel combination: H_z path-memory signal (cycle 7) x voltarget_spy (cycle 2)

strategies.novel_combination: DFA-Hurst path-memory tilt ON vol-target sizing
strategies.reason: build beat incumbent on Sharpe-AND-DD but red-team killed it: edge is noise (difference-Sharpe -0.22, paired t=-1.0), cost-fragile (break-even ~12.5bps), and FAILS persistence-matched placebo (p~0.10-0.12) - not Hurst-specific, indistinguishable from a random-turnover tilt

summary: First novelty-first build: path-memory H_z tilt x vol-target. Looked like a modest PASS but red-team REJECTED - noise, cost-fragile, and fails a persistence-matched placebo (not signal-specific). H_z downgraded from 'validated signal' to 'beyond-VIX but not tradable'. Placebo + difference-significance tests now standard red-team checks.
process_changes: persistence-matched placebo + difference-series significance added to red-team-quant.md
next_cycle_seeds: B2 cross-sectional diversity (under stricter placebo bar)
if salvaging: reframe path-memory as low-turnover drawdown overlay, must beat matched-persistence placebo OOS
standing_recommendation: voltarget_spy remains the ONLY validated strategy
